synthetic-family::Normalized anchor over.name: Normalized anchor overlap
synthetic-family::Normalized anchor over.description: Cross-sample identity / self-similarity baseline — controls for sequencing batch effects

synthetic-family::Seed-extend overlap ra.name: Seed-extend overlap rate
synthetic-family::Seed-extend overlap ra.description: 30bp seed match, verify full-read identity >95%, score by verified overlap count per read

synthetic-family::Overlap count ratio@v1.name: Overlap count ratio
synthetic-family::Overlap count ratio@v1.description: Count reads sharing a 50bp anchor (offset 10bp) — ratio of shared to total reads

synthetic-family::Anchor overlap (60bp)@.name: Anchor overlap (60bp)
synthetic-family::Anchor overlap (60bp)@.description: Index reads by 60bp prefix (trim 10bp ends), compare identity of remaining bases

synthetic-family::Multi-anchor overlap (.name: Multi-anchor overlap (40bp ×3)
synthetic-family::Multi-anchor overlap (.description: Three 40bp anchors per read at different offsets, compare non-anchor bases

synthetic-family::Shared unique reads@v1.name: Shared unique reads
synthetic-family::Shared unique reads@v1.description: Full 148bp exact read matching — Jaccard of unique read sets

synthetic-family::MinHash bottom-sketch.name: MinHash bottom-sketch (k=21)
synthetic-family::MinHash bottom-sketch.description: Keep 5000 smallest canonical 21-mer hashes, compare sketch overlap

synthetic-family::Containment index (k=2.name: Containment index (k=21)
synthetic-family::Containment index (k=2.description: Average of A→B and B→A containment of canonical 21-mers

synthetic-family::Jensen-Shannon diverge.name: Jensen-Shannon divergence (k=21)
synthetic-family::Jensen-Shannon diverge.description: Symmetric KL divergence of k-mer frequency distributions — lower JSD = more similar

synthetic-family::K-mer spectrum cosine.name: K-mer spectrum cosine (k=21)
synthetic-family::K-mer spectrum cosine.description: Cosine similarity of k-mer count vectors — robust to outliers unlike Pearson

synthetic-family::Compression distance (.name: Compression distance (NCD)
synthetic-family::Compression distance (.description: Gzip-based NCD of concatenated read sequences — lower NCD = more related

synthetic-family::HMM-IBD (2-state)@v1.name: HMM-IBD (2-state)
synthetic-family::HMM-IBD (2-state)@v1.description: Hidden Markov Model with IBD/non-IBD states over anchor-matched positions

synthetic-family::K-mer graph similarity.name: K-mer graph similarity (k=21)
synthetic-family::K-mer graph similarity.description: De Bruijn graph edge overlap — Jaccard of (k-1)-mer adjacency edges

synthetic-family::Mutual information (k=.name: Mutual information (k=21)
synthetic-family::Mutual information (k=.description: MI between k-mer presence/absence in sample pairs — captures non-linear dependencies

synthetic-family::K-mer ecosystem (Bray-.name: K-mer ecosystem (Bray-Curtis)
synthetic-family::K-mer ecosystem (Bray-.description: Symbiogenesis: genome as ecosystem — Bray-Curtis dissimilarity of k-mer abundance profiles

synthetic-family::Segment cooperation@v1.name: Segment cooperation
synthetic-family::Segment cooperation@v1.description: Symbiogenesis: co-occurring k-mer pairs at consistent spacing — structural co-inheritance

synthetic-family::K-mer Morisita-Horn in.name: K-mer Morisita-Horn index
synthetic-family::K-mer Morisita-Horn in.description: Symbiogenesis: ecological Morisita-Horn overlap of k-mer abundance distributions

synthetic-family::Recombination distance.name: Recombination distance
synthetic-family::Recombination distance.description: Symbiogenesis: avg length of consecutive shared k-mer runs — fewer breakpoints = more related

synthetic-family::Genome modularity@v1.name: Genome modularity
synthetic-family::Genome modularity@v1.description: Symbiogenesis: cluster reads into modules, compare module frequency distributions

synthetic-family::Run length P90@v1.name: Run length P90
synthetic-family::Run length P90@v1.description: Symbiogenesis: 90th percentile of shared k-mer run lengths — tail captures IBD segments

synthetic-family::Run-weighted Jaccard@v.name: Run-weighted Jaccard
synthetic-family::Run-weighted Jaccard@v.description: Symbiogenesis: weight shared k-mers by run context — sum(run²) / total k-mers

synthetic-family::Run fragmentation inde.name: Run fragmentation index
synthetic-family::Run fragmentation inde.description: Symbiogenesis: Simpson concentration of run lengths — fewer fragments = more related

synthetic-family::Run profile NCD@v1.name: Run profile NCD
synthetic-family::Run profile NCD@v1.description: Symbiogenesis: compression ratio of binary shared/unshared patterns — structured sharing = compressible

synthetic-family::Endosymbiotic transfer.name: Endosymbiotic transfer score
synthetic-family::Endosymbiotic transfer.description: Symbiogenesis: fraction of reads fully absorbed into other genome — intact inherited blocks

synthetic-family::Gap-run ratio (IBD fra.name: Gap-run ratio (IBD fraction)
synthetic-family::Gap-run ratio (IBD fra.description: Symbiogenesis: fraction of positions in shared runs — direct IBD estimator from raw reads

synthetic-family::K-mer synteny correlat.name: K-mer synteny correlation
synthetic-family::K-mer synteny correlat.description: Symbiogenesis: positional order of shared k-mers preserved between matched reads

synthetic-family::Multi-scale run spectr.name: Multi-scale run spectrum
synthetic-family::Multi-scale run spectr.description: Symbiogenesis: weighted avg run length at k=15,21,27,31 — multi-resolution IBD detection
